option.name: updatedContent

option.name: originalContent

option.name: originalContent
option.value: Removed during final cleanup. Spring component scanning wires all services automatically.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Removed/archived artifacts index (hard cleanup)
Canonical records: - ApplicationConfiguration_placeholder.removed - GlobalExceptionHandler_src_stub.removed - InvoiceId_placeholder.removed - README_roadmap_old.removed
Legacy duplicate files are kept only for history and should point to this index.
